critic_raw:
Issue MOD-1 — Scope Jump from Detection to Spread Reduction
Offline precision measures detection. Spread reduction requires measuring reach changes. These are orthogonal metrics.

Issue MOD-2 — Unanalyzed Operational Dependencies
Removal latency, queue prioritization, private group coverage, and user adaptation — all are prerequisites for the spread-reduction claim and none are analyzed.
defender_raw:
Pass 1 (Critic output visible):
MOD-1: Concede — detection metrics and spread-reduction evidence are different things.
MOD-2: Concede — operational pathway is entirely unanalyzed.

Pass 2: Both conceded. Verdict: critique_wins.
adjudication_raw:
